entries.title: 2025-0 - Compass Recovery Group AI Voice Agent Demo & Buffalo Visit Planning

blocks.name: Brian Malczewski
blocks.context: Compass Recovery Group team member participating in weekly sync
blocks.content: Engaged in the AI voice agent demonstration and Buffalo visit logistics discussion, providing real-time feedback on the product direction.

blocks.name: Thalita Berpan
blocks.context: Compass Recovery Group team member in weekly sync
blocks.content: Participated in evaluating the voice agent demo and coordinating the on-site Buffalo visit plans.

blocks.name: Dave Fiorello
blocks.context: Compass Recovery Group team member in weekly sync
blocks.content: Collaborated on reviewing the AI voice agent capabilities and discussing implementation logistics for the Buffalo location.

blocks.name: Bektur Kenzhebaev
blocks.context: Verc team member co-leading the Compass project
blocks.content: Co-facilitated the demo presentation and Buffalo visit planning, coordinating cross-functional alignment between Verc and Compass teams.

outputs: AI Voice Agent Demo presentation to Compass Recovery Group
Buffalo visit logistics and planning coordination
questions: What specific reactions did the Compass team have to the voice agent demo that could inform future AI healthcare product design?
How does planning an on-site visit with a healthcare client differ from remote collaboration, and what does this reveal about enterprise AI adoption?
What assumptions did you make about user needs before this demo, and how did the client's response validate or challenge them?
